documents.title: Credential Rotation
documents.heading: Device removal
documents.text: After removing a device, revoke its session tokens and issue replacement credentials.

documents.title: Empty Target Recovery
documents.heading: Restore proof
documents.text: Prove recoverability by restoring the Recovery Set onto an empty machine before changing the authority model.

documents.title: Incident Ownership
documents.heading: First response
documents.text: The incident commander coordinates responders, records decisions, and owns the handoff.

documents.title: Internal Beta Consent
documents.heading: Embedding trial
documents.text: Internal beta participants receive a direct explanation before wiki section text is sent to the temporary embedding service.

documents.title: Folder Grants
documents.heading: Partner access
documents.text: Give a partner the minimum Folder grant and remove that grant when the collaboration ends.

documents.title: Search Fallback
documents.heading: Provider outage
documents.text: When semantic retrieval is unavailable, continue returning lexical BM25 evidence without blocking sync.

queries.query: What should I do when a laptop is no longer trusted?
How do we know user data can survive a brand new host?
Who is responsible for coordinating an outage?
How are trial users informed about semantic indexing?
What access needs to be removed after outside collaboration finishes?
Can agents still search if vector retrieval is down?
